response.step_by_step_log: 1. 00:00-02:49: Identified as a conversation between VTubers Takane Lui and Nekomata Okayu. 2. 02:49: Started performance of the song 'ZIG-ZAG'. On-screen text provided the music production credits: 中村歩 / 吉村隆行. 3. Performed multiple searches for 'ZIG-ZAG 鷹嶺ルイ 歌詞' and 'ZIG-ZAG 中村歩 吉村隆行 歌詞'. None of the searches returned official lyrics for this specific song, so reference_lyrics_og and reference_lyrics_en are set to null. 4. Adjusted end time to match actual video duration.
response.global_summary: The video features an introductory talk segment between VTubers Takane Lui and Nekomata Okayu, followed by a musical performance of the song 'ZIG-ZAG' by Takane Lui.

scenes.description: Takane Lui and Nekomata Okayu have a conversation. No vocal music is playing.
Takane Lui performs the song 'ZIG-ZAG' on a 3D stage. Musical credits are displayed on screen as '作詞・作曲・編曲：中村歩 / 吉村隆行' (Lyrics/Music/Arrangement: Nakamura Ayumi / Yoshimura Takayuki).
